title: Equity Residential (EQR) Misses Q1 FFO Mark, Guides Q2 in Line
text: While Equity Residential's (EQR) Q1 results highlight healthy demand and lower-than-anticipated bad debt, higher expenses act as a dampener.

title: Equity Residential (EQR) Misses Q1 FFO Estimates
text: Equity Residential (EQR) came out with quarterly funds from operations (FFO) of $0.87 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.88 per share. This compares to FFO of $0.77 per share a year ago.

title: Equity Residential Reports First Quarter 2023 Results
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) today reported results for the quarter ended March 31, 2023. First Quarter 2023 Results All per share results are reported as available to common shares/units on a diluted basis.             Quarter Ended March 31,   2023   2022   $ Change   % Change Earnings Per Share (EPS) $ 0.56   $ 0.19   $ 0.37 194.7 % Funds from Operations (FFO) per share $ 0.85   $ 0.77   $ 0.08   10.4 % Normalized FFO per share $ 0.87   $ 0.77   $ 0.10   13.0 %  .

title: 3 Super Safe Dividend Stocks Yielding 4%+ to Buy Right Now

title: Can UDR Capitalize on the Rebound in the U.S. Apartment Market?
text: As the U.S. apartment market witnesses a resurgence in demand, can UDR ride the wave to deliver robust Q1 2023 earnings? Let's delve into the multifamily REIT's prospects in light of the recent market trends.

title: Is a Beat in Store for Equity Residential (EQR) in Q1 Earnings?
text: Equity Residential's (EQR) Q1 results are likely to benefit from its portfolio diversification efforts and technology investments amid a rebound in demand in the quarter.

title: Equity Residential Announces First Quarter 2023 Earnings Release Date
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) today announced that the Company will release its first quarter 2023 operating results on Tuesday, April 25, 2023 after the close of market and host a conference call to discuss those results on Wednesday, April 26, 2023 at 10:00 a.m. Central. The conference call will be available via web cast on the Investor section of www.equityapartments.com.

title: Single-Family Rental REITs: Renting The American Dream
text: One of the best-performing property sectors this year, Single-Family Rental REITs have rebounded as the previously-sluggish U.S. housing sector has shown signs of life amid a moderation in mortgage rates. The dire predictions of a "hard landing" in rental markets have been rebuffed in recent months by steadying rental rates and strong occupancy trends seen across the major rent indexes.

title: Is it Wise to Retain Equity Residential (EQR) Stock for Now?
text: Healthy demand for residential properties, expansionary efforts and technological innovations bode well for Equity Residential (EQR). The lack of rent relief and interest rate hikes are worrisome.
